name: Pizza Ginger (Bw)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut steak into very thin slivers and place in a bowl.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste, sherry, ginger, garlic, oil, cornstarch, and chili sauce; mix well. Cover and refrigerate for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Add onions and red peppers to the beef mixture and spread on the pizza shell.
4. Bake for 7-10 minutes at 450 degrees.
